style: it-navbar .agid-navbar{background:var(--it-color-primary)} it-navbar .agid-navbar-list{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:.5rem;padding:0 .5rem;margin:0} it-navbar .agid-navbar-link{display:inline-block;padding:.9em 1em;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:3px solid transparent} it-navbar .agid-navbar-link.is-active{border-bottom-color:#fff;font-weight:700}
